title: axi-factorio rc.7 neutral viewer state language

requestBullets: Remove blue, purple, green, and other stage-position colors from pipeline bands and beads.
Use neutral shape, outline, label, and weight to distinguish completed, current, and pending positions.
Keep imported or attested completion distinguishable without adding another position color.
Render healthy awaiting-human-review with explicit orange attention status, not red.
Reserve red for failed, error, or broken states.

viewStates.label: Orange double ring plus Awaiting review text.
Red outlined × reserved for exceptional state.

screenshots.title: All rc.7 bead and status variants
Live Codex trial blob rendered by rc.7 source Viewer

knownLimits: The live screenshot covers imported completion and awaiting review, not a live failed row; failed rendering is covered by the read-model regression test and independent code inspection. The workspace visual packet validator and renderer named by the installed skill are not present in this checkout, so JSON validity and screenshot coverage were checked locally.
